title: Greenpill Cote d'Ivoire — La Ligne Verte
dek: The public Green Mission / La Ligne Verte source supports a planned environmental action platform, with targets that must stay labeled as goals.
excerpt: A source-backed Cote d'Ivoire story for environmental action and steward review.
body:
Greenpill Cote d'Ivoire has a public Regen Hub source for La Ligne Verte / Green Mission.

The research artifact flags the 2025-2026 targets as targets, not delivered metrics. The website should present them as planned goals unless a follow-up public source confirms completion.

## Sources

- S022: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-civ-chapter-update-the-beginning-of-la-ligne-verte/333
author: Greenpill Network research

seo.title: Greenpill Cote d'Ivoire La Ligne Verte · Greenpill Stories
seo.description: Source-backed Cote d'Ivoire story for La Ligne Verte and Green Mission goals.
